comingSoon.title: Desktop software in development
comingSoon.body: TPV and KDS modules require a dedicated desktop application that we are preparing. Meanwhile, you can pair mobile devices (AppStaff) using the QR code above.

qr.desktopHint: Scan this code on the device where the {{deviceType}} desktop app is installed.
qr.desktopComingSoon: Desktop app in development — coming soon.

quickLink.tpvDesktopRequiredRedirectNotice: TPV requires the desktop application. Redirecting to Devices…
